title: Begone! "Chat Messgaes Can't Be verified"
description: Removes Chat messages cant be verified message upon joining servers.
body:
Removes Chat messages cant be verified message upon joining servers.(Verison 1.2 Also Removes Chat Tags) Notes: Language must be set to English US Narrator Message Box Will Be missing.

<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/f-eW9N0zr0A" width="560" height="315" title="Begone! "Chat Messages Can't Be Verified Showcase"" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Planet Minecraft: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/begone-chat-messgaes-can-t-be-verified/ (Latest Version Only)
